name: Proofpoint DLP
description: Integrates with Proofpoint Enterprise DLP and Information Protection REST API for incident monitoring, alert management, and data loss event investigation

actions.name: List DLP Incidents
actions.description: Retrieve DLP incidents across all channels including email, endpoint, cloud, and web

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for incident query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter by DLP channel (email, endpoint, cloud, web)

parameters.name: severity
parameters.description: Filter by severity (critical, high, medium, low)

parameters.name: status
parameters.description: Filter by incident status (open, investigating, resolved, dismissed)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of incidents to return

actions.name: Get Incident Details
actions.description: Retrieve full details of a specific DLP incident including sensitive data matches and user activity context

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the DLP incident

actions.name: List DLP Policies
actions.description: Retrieve all DLP policies configured across channels

parameters.name: channel
parameters.description: Filter policies by channel (email, endpoint, cloud, web)

actions.name: List DLP Alerts
actions.description: Retrieve DLP alerts forwarded from Proofpoint endpoint and ITM platforms

parameters.name: startDate
parameters.description: Start date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: endDate
parameters.description: End date for alert query (ISO 8601 format)

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of alerts to return

actions.name: Update Incident
actions.description: Update incident status, assign a reviewer, or add notes to a DLP incident

parameters.name: incidentId
parameters.description: Unique identifier of the incident to update

parameters.name: assignee
parameters.description: Email address of the user to assign

parameters.name: note
parameters.description: Note to add to the incident
